subject: Outlook add-in does not show Zoom meeting in calendar
description: New meetings lack Zoom button; user manually pastes links from web scheduler.

ts_steps.title: Identify Outlook flavor
ts_steps.action: New Outlook toggle vs classic — add-in type differs.

ts_steps.title: Get Add-ins
ts_steps.action: Enable Zoom for Outlook store add-in.

ts_steps.title: COM add-ins
ts_steps.action: Classic: File → Options → Add-ins → COM — check Zoom Outlook Plugin.

ts_steps.title: Reinstall Zoom with plugin
ts_steps.action: Custom install ensure Outlook integration checked if MSI offers.

ts_steps.title: Tenant standard
ts_steps.action: IT may mandate Teams-only — confirm policy.

internal_information: New vs classic Outlook; web add-in vs COM; bitness; org policy.
